problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
hypothesis: If Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus is applied to autism, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
